summary: iter132 (Duel viralization) + iter133 (Transport rider/driver MVP audit & fixes)

duel_finalization_p0.push_notification_on_completion: OK — send_social_notification fired in submit_quiz_duel after txn commits, async non-blocking, OneSignal silent if OFF. 3 message variants (winner/loser/tie).
duel_finalization_p0.rematch_endpoint: OK — POST /api/duel/{token}/rematch with auto-discover last submitted run, inverted roles. Tested: Alice→Bob rematch returned new token + intended_opponent=Bob.
duel_finalization_p0.improved_whatsapp_text: OK — buildShareText() with 4 variants (won/lost/tie/observer) all ending with explicit challenge call.
duel_finalization_p0.psychological_messages: OK — pressureMsg displays victory/defeat/tie hint as a pill above the scoreboard.
duel_finalization_p0.percentile_rank: OK — GET /api/duel/me/rank returns percentile/rank/total_players. Tested: Alice rank=3/5 → top 60% (min_plays=true).
duel_finalization_p0.frontend_rematch_btn: OK — gradient purple-red button visible only for participants; toasts on backend errors (Joue/Terminez).

transport_audit_p0.client_phone_visible_to_driver: OK — _ride_to_dict exposes rider.phone + rider.avatar; ride_detail query SELECTs u.phone_number/du.phone_number. Tested: Bob's phone +237651234567 returned in his own ride detail.
transport_audit_p0.driver_phone_visible_to_rider: OK — same pattern via du JOIN.
transport_audit_p0.tracking_endpoint: OK — new GET /api/transport/{ride_id}/tracking returns eta_seconds + distance_meters + stage; computes via haversine + 25 km/h urban speed assumption. Tested 200 on pending (null fields).
transport_audit_p0.cancelled_by_driver_distinct: OK — cancel_ride sets 'cancelled_by_driver' if driver, 'cancelled' if rider.
transport_audit_p0.cancel_grace_timer: OK — transport_rider_cancel_after_seconds=60 default; rider 409 if cancel <60s after accept.
transport_audit_p0.frontend_contact_cards: OK — ClientContactCard (driver view) + DriverContactCard (rider view) with tel: and wa.me buttons; only shown when status in {accepted, en_route, arriving, started}.

tests_run_manually: POST /api/duel/l8zAPHUyw1uS4gQiGxJnVg/rematch → 200, new token DSGiUtRX1VBDVYjsXW3XYA, challenger=Alice, intended_opponent=Bob
POST /api/transport/request 2x (same user) → 409 'Vous avez déjà une course'
still_pending_p1: 'arriving' auto-state when driver position < 100m from pickup (needs lifecycle hook on /position ping)
Push notif 'driver accepted' when KYC-validated driver accepts (already has in-app notification, just needs OneSignal wrapper)
Rematch limited to quiz only (tap rematch could be added but lower priority)
frontend_build: yarn build clean in 61s — no warnings/errors
